response: People with braces are dental appliances designed to correct misaligned teeth and improve oral health. They have no connection to gravitational forces or the ability to manipulate gravity. The concept of manipulating gravity at will is a scientific impossibility under current understanding of physics. Braces do not grant any special abilities, and their primary function is limited to orthodontic treatment. This misunderstanding likely stems from a mix-up between dental equipment and fictional powers. The weakness lies in the confusion between real-world medical devices and supernatural capabilities. Weakness.
